# @platform/contracts-organisation

Organisation profile contract package: OrganisationProfile schema, update request/response shapes.

## Responsibilities

- Own OrganisationProfile Zod schema and TypeScript type
- Define UpdateOrganisationProfileRequest schema with validation constraints
- Expose the OrganisationProfile shape as the get/update profile response type

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not implement organisation data access or persistence
- Does not import React or any framework-specific packages
- Does not own session or authentication logic
- Does not import @platform/* packages

## Public exports and usage


- Imported by application and platform packages that need organisation contract types
- Used in API boundaries to validate and type organisation profile data
